name: Creole Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low and simmer gently for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Stir occasionally until desired consistency is reached.
5. Serve immediately or store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
NOTE: This Creole Sauce pairs well with vegetables, meats, or poultry.
